user.title: GoodWe Local SEMS Bridge
user.description: Select the GoodWe integration to sync with SEMS

sems_credentials.title: SEMS API Credentials
sems_credentials.description: Enter your SEMS account credentials. Your power stations and inverters will be fetched automatically.

select_station.title: Select Power Station
select_station.description: Choose your SEMS power station. The first station is selected by default.

select_inverter.title: Select Inverter
select_inverter.description:
Choose your inverter. Device ID and serial number will be derived automatically.

Default device ID: `{device_id}` | Serial: `{device_serial}`

sync_settings.title: Cloud Sync Settings
sync_settings.description: Enable or disable cloud synchronization to SEMS

data_description.sync_to_cloud: Enable syncing inverter data to Goodwe SEMS cloud at 60-second intervals using POSTGW protocol

abort.no_goodwe_integration: No GoodWe integration found. Please set up the GoodWe integration first.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to SEMS portal. Check your network connection.
error.cannot_fetch_stations: Authenticated successfully but failed to retrieve power stations.
error.no_stations: No power stations found on this SEMS account.
error.cannot_fetch_inverters: Failed to retrieve inverters for the selected station.
error.no_inverters: No inverters found for the selected power station.
